title: ochthocosmus gossweileri
intro: Ochthocosmus gossweileri, also known as the Gossweiler's ochthocosmus, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ochthocosmus gossweileri are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a decoction or infusion for topical application and oral consumption.
